channel.title: Tech on Plot Twist Daily
channel.description: Recent content in Tech on Plot Twist Daily

item.title: Tech Today: OpenAI Robotics Lead Quits Over Pentagon Deal
item.author: arty.craftson@pottersquill.com (Arty Craftson)
item.description:
OpenAI Robotics Lead Quits Over Pentagon Deal

The Story

Caitlin Kalinowski, head of OpenAI’s robotics team, has resigned in response to the company’s controversial Pentagon agreement. This marks another high-profile departure as AI companies navigate military partnerships.

Key Takeaways

  • Kalinowski’s departure signals internal tension over AI-military ties
  • Pentagon recently classified Anthropic as a ‘supply chain risk’
  • Google making Gmail/Drive easier for AI agents to use

What This Means

For the AI industry: Expect more scrutiny on military contracts. For developers: Agentic AI tools are getting more powerful. For the future: The line between AI companies and defense continues to blur.
